selection_policy.goal: A TaskOps-friendly ALE subset emphasizing LLM reading/reasoning and image understanding while avoiding licensed or hard-to-install commercial tools.
include: Task appears in ALE's official unlicensed overall selection.
Tooling is free/open-source or common free desktop software.
Prefer CPU/free snapshots; no licensed GPU/proprietary creative suites.
Tasks expose structured artifacts suitable for TaskOps run graph and EoW scoring.
exclude: Licensed commercial software such as Adobe, DaVinci Resolve, PowerMill, or Microsoft PowerPoint.
Tasks whose first value is professional GUI operation rather than LLM/tool orchestration.
Very specialized heavy simulators are deferred unless they are already useful as a long-work stressor.

tasks.title: Single-FOV MERFISH Image Decoding And Cell Segmentation
tasks.summary: Run the full MERFISH image-analysis pipeline on one field of view of U2OS cells: decode transcripts against a 130-gene MHD4 codebook, segment nuclei from the DAPI tile, assign transcripts to cells, and emit a cell-by-gene count matrix plus quality metrics.

input_files.name: Starfish experiment manifest
input_files.description: Top-level starfish Experiment v5.0.0 manifest with per-(round, channel) `scale_factors`.

input_files.name: MHD4 codebook
input_files.description: 140 targets (130 real genes + 10 `Blank-*` controls) with 16-bit MHD4 codewords.

input_files.name: Primary images manifest
input_files.description: Starfish top-level primary-images manifest trimmed to `fov_000` only.

input_files.name: Nuclei images manifest
input_files.description: Starfish top-level nuclei manifest trimmed to `fov_000` only.

input_files.name: Primary FOV tile manifest
input_files.description: Per-FOV manifest enumerating 16 primary tiles for (round 0-7, channel 0-1).

input_files.name: Nuclei FOV tile manifest
input_files.description: Per-FOV manifest for the single DAPI tile.

input_files.name: Primary fluorescence tiles
input_files.description: 16 pre-registered 2048x2048 tiles (h in 0..7, c in 0..1) to decode against the codebook.

input_files.name: DAPI nuclear stain tile
input_files.description: Single 2048x2048 DAPI image used to segment nuclei.

input_files.name: Task brief
input_files.description: Evaluator-safe solve-time brief (no thresholds, no gold reference).

input_files.name: Output contract
input_files.description: Required output paths, columns, and dtypes; no per-gene expected counts.

input_files.name: Runtime dependency manifest
input_files.description: Pinned dependencies (`starfish==0.3.4`, `cellpose==3.1.1`, `torch`, NumPy/SciPy/pandas/scikit-image) for `uv sync --frozen`.

input_files.name: Runtime dependency lockfile
input_files.description: Resolved uv lockfile (87 packages against Python 3.11) consumed by `uv sync --frozen` and the `software/merfish_runtime.sh` wrapper.

input_files.name: Python version pin
input_files.description: Python version pin (`3.11`) consumed by `uv`.

input_files.name: Canonical Python entry point
input_files.description: Wrapper that behaves like a Python interpreter; forwards args to `uv run --frozen --project input/runtime_env/pyproject.toml python "$@"` with the agent-scoped uv env under `output/.agent_runtime_env/`.

reference_files.name: Decoded transcripts
reference_files.description: Columns `gene, x, y, is_exact, total_magnitude`; one row per threshold-filtered decoded spot in pixel coordinates.

reference_files.name: Cell segmentation mask
reference_files.description: 2048x2048 `uint16` labeled mask with background=0 and contiguous positive cell labels.

reference_files.name: Cell-by-gene count matrix
reference_files.description: Leading `cell_id` column followed by the 130 real genes in codebook order; integer counts.

reference_files.name: Quality metrics
reference_files.description: Scalar keys `total_decoded_transcripts`, `blank_rate`, `exact_match_fraction`, `n_cells`, `assigned_fraction`, `mean_transcripts_per_cell`.

tasks.title: Pre-Restoration Shot Log: Vintage Animation Remaster
tasks.summary: Produce a temporal per-shot continuity log (DOCX) for a public-domain 1931 Yasuji Murata animation as the archival-documentation pass that precedes a restoration / remaster pipeline. The log must preserve the factual visual record the downstream QC team's fact-check brief depends on, without the archivist answering or editorializing.

input_files.name: Yasuji_Murata-_A_Wolf_is_a_Wolf_(1931).ogv
input_files.description: Input short video to inspect.

input_files.name: video_storyboard_qa_set.docx
input_files.description: Question set that defines which factual details the storyboard must preserve.

reference_files.name: storyboard.docx
reference_files.description: Required storyboard document.
